ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Filing Of The Trustee'S First Account
Off Calendar Feb-09-2026 Continued To Apr-13-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Marta Eisenberg, Esq., for James Pierce, II, Trustee.

At the court's query RE: The status of the First Account, counsel reports on the Conservatee's recent passing and requests a continuance.

The court grants counsel's request and the matter is continued to Apr-13-2026 at 9:00 AM in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Michael McNaughton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Aug-11-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar May-12-2025 Continued To Aug-11-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: The following cases were heard together:
PCN-08-291060, Conservatorship of Naomi Pierce; and
PTR-24-307492, Naomi Pierce Trust

Appearances:
Marta Eisenberg for and with James Pierce II, Conservator/Trustee (via Zoom).
Avid Alavi for Naomi Pierce, Conservatee (via Zoom).

Ms. Eisenberg reported that James Pierce delivered a $30,000 check to Victorian Manor, bringing the arrearage current. The remaining payment for May, approximately $3,300, is expected by the end of the month. Ms. Eisenberg proposed filing a petition to sell the Clear Lake property, valued at approximately $145,000, to fund the trust and reduce the financial burden on Mr. Pierce. Ms. Alavi supported the proposed sale of the Clear Lake property and expressed satisfaction with the care provided to Ms. Pierce at Victorian Manor.

After discussions, the court took the hearing on Status of Conservatorship off calendar in the conservatorship case. In the trust matter, the court continued the hearing on Status of Filing Inventory & Appraisal by Trustee to August 11, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar May-05-2025 Continued To May-12-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Bring Trust Under Court Supervision
Off Calendar Dec-09-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Marta Eisenberg for and with James Pierce II, Petitioner (via Zoom).
Lawrence Siracusa for Naomi Pierce, Settlor-Beneficiary/Conservatee (via Zoom).

The court discussed the recently filed supplemental declaration filed by petitioner and raised questions regarding a bond. Ms. Eisenberg stated that the trust terms do not require a bond, and the trust and estate have limited resources. Mr. Siracusa confirmed the trust waives the bond and agreed a bond is unnecessary. The court took the petition under submission with intent to grant with no bond requirement.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
